title: Unlimited Chisel Works
description: Procedurally generated Chisel variants for various blocks provided by other mods.
body:
Unlimited Chisel Works is a Minecraft mod which adds procedurally generated Chisel variants for various blocks provided by other mods.

### Features

* Generates Chisel variants of blocks based on simple rules
* 100% unbalanced - adding new variants does not require effort

### Supported Mods

    AbyssalCraft
    Advanced Rocketry
    Aether Legacy
    Applied Energistics 2
    Astral Sorcery
    Atum 2
    Bamboozled
    Better With Addons
    BetterNether
    Bewitchment
    Binnie's Mods (Botany) - requires addon
    Binnie's Mods (Extra Trees)
    Biomes O' Plenty
    Botania
    Calculator
    ChinjufuMod
    Covens
    Dark Utilities
    Defiled Lands (Tenebra Planks)
    Earthworks
    Environmental Materials
    EnvironmentalTech
    Forestry
    Fossils and Archaeology Revival
    FuturePack
    GregTech Community Edition
    Immersive Engineering
    Integrated Dynamics
    KemonoCraft
    LightningCraft
    Minestrappolation 5
    Natura
    Natural Pledge
    Nature's Aura
    Oh, The Biomes You'll Go!
    Quark
    Plants 2
    PrimalCore (1.11+)
    Prodigy Tech
    Project: Vibrant Journeys
    Railcraft
    RealWorld
    Redwoods
    Roots
    Rustic
    Silent's Gems (1.12+)
    SonarCore
    Spooky Biomes
    SugiForest
    TechReborn
    Terra - Biomes & Stuff
    TerraFirmaCraft ("TNG") - requires addon
    TerraFirmaCraft 2 - requires addon
    Terraqueous
    Thaumcraft 6 (planks)
    Totemic
    Traverse
    Underground Biomes
    Wild Nature
    Wizardry
    Zoesteria

### Known Issues

* Due to the hacky nature of the 1.10/1.11 ports, it is required to ensure that the mod is loaded as late as possible for it to detect all available blocks.
* Using LiteLoader on Minecraft 1.10.2 breaks UCW textures. As the problem is not present on Minecraft 1.11.2, which uses an identical way of acquiring textures, I suspect it is a LiteLoader bug.

### FAQ

* Q: Can I add support for Unlimited Chisel Works in my own mod?
* A: Yes! See assets/unlimitedchiselworks/ucwdefs for the format, and bundle similar files as assets/[modid]/ucwdefs. (However, if you want your mod to stay up-to-date with the latest improvements, you might want to consider simply pull requesting the file.)
* Q: Are you planning a 1.7.10 version?
* A: Unfortunately, no. The mod's magic relies in no small part on functionality introduced in Minecraft 1.8 and above, and a 1.7.10 version would be much more difficult to create while retaining compatibility with Chisel and other mods as well as it is done now.
* Q: I'm running out of block IDs and I can't run the mod!
* A: Use the unlimitedchiselworks.cfg config file to disable the blocks you don't need Chisel variants for. The block IDs scale up very quickly, so be careful!
* Q: I can't see any blocks!
* A: By default, the only blocks this mod adds require the presence of both Chisel and the original block-providing mod.
